title: Youtube Poop: Coklat Melankolik Oggy
description:
An old youtube poop I made in 2014. 
My first youtube poop without any sentence mixing.
Oggy's chocolate melancholy.

Songs: 
Tchaikovsky Romeo and Juliet Love Theme
Super Driver from The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya
Song of Storm and Fire (Orchestra Version) From Tsubasa Chronicles
